name: Cep Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cep by trimming out all the little visitors and slicing thinly.
2. Slice the garlic thinly and fry together in a small amount of butter over low heat, ensuring not to brown the garlic.
3. Tear the salad leaves into a bowl with one or two crushed walnuts.
4. Empty the mushrooms and garlic into the bowl and dress with walnut oil.
